basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Scientist B Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Scientist B Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. Has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Scientist B Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per Government of India ICMR rules

qualification.education_qualification: 1st Class Master's degree in Life Sciences, Physical Science or PhD Degree
qualification.details: Project Scientist B : 1st Class Master's degree in Life Sciences, Physical Science, and Chemical science from a recognized university with 2 years of research experience or PhD Degree (As per ICMR Rule).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Scientist B Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
